subject: Three distinct humanoid creatures confronting each other in a forest clearing, with a prone figure on the ground
description: Three figures stand in a forest clearing lit by soft diffuse light: on the left, a tall blue-scaled merfolk-type figure with fin-like crests and purple accents raises open hands; in the center, a small green goblin-type figure with large ears stands on a log or stump, pointing; on the right, a humanoid figure in a flowing purple robe gestures with one extended hand toward the others, appearing to accuse or address them. Between the three, at the bottom of the frame, a humanoid figure appears to be lying prone on the ground. The forest behind them is pale and hazy with tall trees.
foreground: Blue merfolk figure, small goblin on a stump, robed humanoid gesturing; prone figure on the ground
background: Pale hazy forest, tall trees with soft light
emotion: accusatory tension; the figures confront each other over the body
